sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29686" key="duwdeka/mhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠωδεκά-μηνος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠωδεκαταῖος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠωδέκατος</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">δωδ</itype>-.</entryFree>
